examples.input:
JOHN DOE
    Software Engineer
    Experience:
    - Acme Corp (2020-Present): Developed scalable microservices using Python and Docker. Managed a team of 3 junior developers.
    - TechNova (2018-2020): Frontend developer using React and Redux. Improved page load times by 20%.
    Education: B.S. in Computer Science, State University.
examples.expected: John Doe works as a Software Engineer at Acme Corp, where he develops microservices using Python and Docker.

examples.input:
EMPLOYEE HANDBOOK 2024
    Leave Policy:
    Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid time off (PTO) per year. Up to 5 days of unused PTO can be carried over to the next year. Sick leave is separate and provides 10 days per year, non-accruing.
    Remote Work:
    Employees may work from home up to 2 days a week with manager approval. Core hours are 10 AM to 3 PM local time.
examples.expected: Employees receive 20 days of PTO annually, with the option to carry over up to 5 unused days to the following year. Sick leave is a separate 10-day allowance.
